economic_notes: Alderville Solar Limited Partnership (ASLP) is a government business enterprise accounted for on modified equity basis. Alderville Solar Inc. and Alderville Community Development Corporation are fully consolidated subsidiaries.
notes: Prior year (2020) shows a very large deficit of $67.6M and expenses of $79M, likely due to a large one-time item in Lands and membership expenses ($70.9M in 2020 vs $2.1M in 2021). Consolidated entity includes Alderville Solar Inc. and Alderville Community Development Corporation. ASLP is treated as GBE on modified equity basis. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + Other Federal grants + Province of Ontario + Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership + Other government and non-government (5533713+115343+1556250+856876+5522335=13584517); osr = investment income + amounts in trust + GBE income = 188602+2759+719219=910580. Accounts receivable includes due from government $323,361 and other accounts receivable $116,769. Lands and membership expense in 2020 was $70,963,157 suggesting a major settlement or write-off occurred that year.
